subject: No one can hear me in Zoom
description: Microphone works in other apps; Zoom shows mic unmuted but participants hear silence.

ts_steps.title: Zoom audio settings
ts_steps.action: Zoom → Settings → Audio — pick correct mic; Test Mic; uncheck 'Automatically adjust microphone'.

ts_steps.title: macOS input
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Sound → Input — set correct device and input level while speaking.

ts_steps.title: Restart audio
ts_steps.action: Leave meeting, quit Zoom completely, rejoin; if Bluetooth headset, reconnect audio profile.

internal_information: Wrong input device, Bluetooth profile stuck on HFP quality, or Zoom audio driver glitch. Reinstall Zoom if persistent.
